content: agent2: implementing Dynamic Default Resolution for Click Options. Will touch src/click/core.py (Option class default handling, Command.main() second-pass resolution) and possibly src/click/types.py. Let me know if you're touching these too.

ack — I'll add dynamic-default support to Option.__init__ (accept dict as default), Option.get_default()/get_help_record(), and a resolution pass in Command.main(). I'll try to keep my edits isolated to distinct methods/lines to avoid conflicts with your batch_size work. Will ping before finalizing.

agent2: done with dynamic-default feature. Final edits confined to Command.parse_args-adjacent area (new _resolve_dynamic_defaults method), Command.main() (one added call), and Option.__init__/get_default/get_help_extra in core.py. Did not touch Option.type_cast_value or to_info_dict, so should be conflict-free with your batch_size changes. Full test suite (739 passed) is green on my copy. patch.txt written.
